stories.title: Play-In Tournament Night 1 — Tonight's Elimination Games (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
LaMelo Ball and the Hornets were 11-23 on Jan. 2.

Tonight they HOST Miami in an elimination Play-In game.

33 wins in 57 games to get here. LaMelo's moment. 7:30 PM ET on Prime Video. #HoopHeroes #Hornets #NBAPlayIn

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Devin Booker (26.1 PPG) vs. Deni Avdija (24.2 PPG).

Winner faces the No. 2 Spurs in the first round.

Suns vs. Blazers. 10 PM ET on Prime Video tonight. This one matters. #HoopHeroes #Suns #NBAPlayIn

article.headline: Play-In Night 1: LaMelo's Hornets Host Heat, Suns Face Blazers in Elimination Showdowns

stories.title: SGA Breaks Wilt's Record — History in Every Game (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Shai Gilgeous-Alexander broke Wilt Chamberlain's record for consecutive games with 20+ points this season.

31.6 PPG. 55% FG. 64-16 OKC.

Some seasons just belong in a different conversation. #HoopHeroes #Thunder #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
SGA's 2025-26 season by the numbers:

31.6 PPG | 55% FG | 6.5 APG | 88/100 ESPN MVP votes

OKC went 64-16 — BEST record in the NBA.

Back-to-back MVP isn't a question anymore. It's a formality. #HoopHeroes #OKCThunder #NBAMVP

article.headline: SGA Breaks Wilt Chamberlain's Record — A Season That Belongs in History

stories.title: Wembanyama's Dominance — Unanimous DPOY and San Antonio's 24-3 Surge (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Victor Wembanyama this season:

25 PPG | 11.5 RPG | 3.1 BPG | 51% FG

The first unanimous DPOY in NBA history is basically locked. -5000 odds. #HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
San Antonio Spurs since the All-Star break:

24-3.

A 62-20 team. No. 2 in the West. First Spurs playoffs since 2019.

Wemby's era has officially arrived. #HoopHeroes #Spurs #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Cade Cunningham's Comeback — Pistons Reach No. 1 East (FOLLOW-UP)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Detroit Pistons two seasons ago: 14-68 (worst in NBA).

Detroit Pistons this season: 60-22. No. 1 seed in the East.

Cade Cunningham is the reason. First 60-win season since 2005-06. #HoopHeroes #Pistons #NBAPlayoffs

article.headline: Cade Cunningham's Comeback: How the Pistons Went From 14-68 to the No. 1 East Seed

stories.title: Cleveland's Harden-Mitchell Duo — Ready for Playoff Glory (NEW STORY)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
James Harden in 25 games as a Cavalier:

20.6 PPG | 7.8 APG | career-high 46.6% FG | 43.8% from three

Cleveland is 16-6 with both Harden and Mitchell. The No. 4 seed is DANGEROUS. #HoopHeroes #Cavaliers #NBAPlayoffs

## Notes / Flags
- SGA's Wilt Chamberlain record claim: confirmed from single source (Heavy.com). Label MEDIUM. Present in article carefully — "reportedly broke" language or omit specific Wilt reference if no cross-source.
- Wemby's "first since Shaq 1999-2000" stat: CBS Sports-type summary, treat as MEDIUM, include with caveat language.
- Play-In game results not yet available — games tip off tonight. Content is preview/anticipation angle, not recap.
- Harden career-high FG% claim: single source; present as notable achievement, not absolute certainty without a second source.
